• ° - Who the hell did that boy think he was?— After years of your families service, of YOUR service.. You had gotten what they called.. a ‘ break. ‘ Alongside Councillor Heimerdinger..

• ° - Only now, he’s run off to the undercity for some odd reason, and you need to find him FAST before he winds up getting killed.. or worst.

• ° - but before you do.. you meet somebody who could very well do with some help, even if it’s from a piltie.
